column1: Table 1b. Overnight trips, visitor nights and regional expenditure by state/territory visiteda,
a. All figures relate to Australian residents aged 14 years and over.
b. Components may not add to total as visitors may visit more than one state/territory on a trip.
c. Total includes unspecified and offshore visitors that could not be allocated to a state or territory.
np. Data is not publishable as the error is too high for most practical purposes.
Source: Tourism Research Australia: Domestic Tourism Statistics
